rationale.elo_k: Covers slow, moderate, and fast sequential rating adaptation.
rationale.trend_half_life_days: Covers short, medium, and long form memory.
rationale.logistic_c: Log-spaced L2 strength for the direct three-feature logistic.
rationale.calibration: Platt logistic calibration fitted on training predictions replaces dense temperature/shift search.
rationale.search_size: 3 Elo K × 3 half-lives × 7 C = 63 direct logistics; plus one Platt-calibrated blend challenger per feature architecture (9) = 72 candidates total.

blend_challenger.notes: Original-style log-odds blend retained as a challenger; Platt-calibrated per fold. Not promoted unless it wins pre-March mean log loss.

notes: Dense 341k temperature/shift grids are intentionally removed.
Temperature and shift do not change ranking for T>0; they are not treated as distinct ranking models.
